title: Phase 2: Wire config into runners and CLI
description: Wire OrchestratorConfig into runner.py and cli.py. Both runners accept config and backend in __init__. cli.py loads config via load_config() and resolves backend from --runner flag > env var > config.default_runner. ClaudeCodeAgentRunner resolves per-agent-type allowed tools via config.allowed_tools_for(). Remove _RUNNERS registry dict and hardcoded binary names, CLI flags, --allowedTools string, default runner.
acceptance_criteria: cli.py make_services() calls load_config(root) and threads config through
Both runners accept config and backend in __init__
CodexAgentRunner builds cmd from self.backend.binary + self.backend.flags
ClaudeCodeAgentRunner resolves tools via config.allowed_tools_for('claude', agent_type)
Backward compatibility: default_config() used if config not passed to constructor
